user.title: Ring Clip Downloader
user.description: Using your existing Ring account ({ring_account}) to download clips. Configure where to save them below.

data_description.panel_title: Label shown in the HA sidebar and panel header
data_description.download_path: Must be inside /media so clips are accessible in HA Media Browser
data_description.retention_days: Clips older than this will be automatically deleted
data_description.poll_interval: Lower values use more Ring API quota

abort.already_configured: Ring Clip Downloader is already configured
abort.ring_not_configured: No Ring integration found. Set up the Ring integration first.

error.invalid_path: Path could not be created. Ensure it is inside /media.
